title: Persist local route history with evidence
action: Add browser localStorage persistence for saved routes. Define SavedRoute with id, title, createdAt, favorite, nodes, edges, evidence, ruleVersion, and schemaVersion. Persist recent non-favorite routes with latest 10 cap while preserving all favorites. Saved evidence must include recommendation rationale and sourceRefs.
implementation: Add storage helpers loadSavedRoutes, saveRoute, toggleFavorite, and pruneRecentRoutes in src/main.tsx or a colocated helper if extraction is clearer.
Use a single localStorage key such as maestro-wiki.saved-routes.v1.
When saving the current route, include recommendation evidence with sourceRefs and ruleVersion.
Render saved recent/favorite routes in a compact local panel that does not reintroduce the large permanent right sidebar.
Add unit tests for latest 10 non-favorite cap, favorites preserved, and evidence retained.
